---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or improvement for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Summary
Briefly describe the feature you’d like to see.  
*(One or two sentences that capture the essence of your idea.)*

---

## 🤔 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve?  
*(Explain the pain point or limitation you’re experiencing.)*

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe your ideal solution.  
*(How should this feature work? What would the user experience look like?)*

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
List any alternative approaches you’ve thought about.  
*(Why is your proposed solution better than these alternatives?)*

---

## 📚 Additional Context
Add any extra details, references, screenshots, or mockups that help explain your request.

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Clear description of the feature
- [ ] Addresses the stated problem
- [ ] Provides value to users
